Short CV

Born in İzmir in 1978, Cem Tutar received an associate degree from Dokuz Eylül University, İzmir Vocational School, Department of Economics and Administrative Programs, Local Administrations in 1999. In 2006, he graduated from Ege University, Faculty of Communication, Department of Radio, Television and Cinema with first place. In 2009, he received his master's degree from Dokuz Eylül University Fine Arts Institute, Department of Cinema and Television with the thesis titled "An Ideological Analysis Example in the Context of International Television Channels: Discovery Channel".
